title: OptiFancyFPS
description: A client-side modpack that should optimize your FPS.
body: This client-side optimization modpack focuses on delivering a smoother, faster, and cleaner Minecraft experience without changing core gameplay. It boosts FPS, reduces lag, and improves stability through performance-enhancing mods like Sodium and Lithium. Mouse Tweaks refines inventory management for greater efficiency. To complete the look, the pack includes both Faithful 32x and Faithful 64x resource packs, providing a crisp, detailed, yet unmistakably vanilla-style visual upgrade. Perfect for players seeking high performance and classic aesthetics.
